programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A family of three moving from Colorado to Texas wants a slower pace and a big-acreage home with modern flair, unavailable where they're coming from.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna's longtime friend Brett has a dream of living on a houseboat on Lake Waco, but his tight budget and space create plenty of design challenges.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Jenny and Ramil are moving to Waco, Texas, from California to be closer to Ramil's mother; they are looking for something that needs work despite initial concerns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Andrew and Brittany are first-time buyers; they're looking for a home with plenty of space for their beloved pooches.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Seeking to escape to a place where their family can unplug and enjoy nature, Jason and Crystal set out to build a 320-square-foot cabin on the Maine coastline in just 12 days with the help of a small group of friends.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home; they have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A fantasy-loving family decides to build their own underground home in the hills of Virginia; with shipment delays, errors and severe weather, the couple must fight to make their dream world a reality.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state; Mother Nature and bleeding-edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A couple wants to build a country cottage on their remote family farm in southeast Georgia despite the fact that building that kind of structure in four months will be anything but easy; the novice builders face material delays, hurricanes and wildlife.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: A fantasy-loving family decides to build their own underground home in the hills of Virginia; with shipment delays, errors and severe weather, the couple must fight to make their dream world a reality.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: A museum in Townsend, Tenn., enlists the Barnwood Builders to restore a 19th-century gunsmith's cabin to be the centerpiece of an exhibit; after repairing the timbers, the team faces the challenge of stacking them flush with a 9-foot ceiling.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: "The Barnwood Builders" return to Lake Lure, N.C., to rebuild Russel's Fort, a historic 1770s log cabin they salvaged months before; the fort now has a gorgeous view of the lake, but the build is full of challenges.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys head to Albertville, Ala., to build a log cabin guest house high atop Sand Mountain; Mark visits a finished cabin he and the guys built on Lake Guntersville; Sherman and Johnny visit a woodturner who makes handcrafted wooden tops.

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth makes pear and Gorgonzola pizza as well as a rustic garbanzo bean soup with chili oil.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth wants to celebrate a close friend who recently had twins; to give her a chance to relax, Elizabeth prepares a roasted cherry tomato tart and chocolate chip cookies for brunch on the ranch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: It's lavender season on the ranch; Elizabeth's friends and family help harvest the lavender field behind her parents' house; as a thank you, Elizabeth makes chicken piri piri and lemon cake with lemon curd buttercream frosting.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth Poett welcomes us to her family's 14,000-acre ranch in California; working side by side with her husband, Austin, she tends to the land beginning at dawn; for dinner, she prepares a Santa Maria Style Tri-Tip and a Blackberry-Apple Galette.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Life as a rancher and a mom can be busy, so Elizabeth invites close friends and fellow moms to the ranch for a well-deserved night off; she prepares ribeye steaks and serves a walnut cake with burnt butter cream frosting for dessert.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: Elizabeth spends the day working cattle with her father at the historic Red Corrals; later, she hosts her parents for dinner and prepares some of their favorites, including arroz con pollo and lemon meringue pie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family of 30.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan, and they're doing all the renovation work themselves; he's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Nashville couple wants a waterfront retreat on Alabama's Smith Lake to escape their hectic lives; they may have to take on major renovations to create space where they can make memories with their kids and entertain friends and family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Spruce Up on Alabama's Smith Lake
programme.desc: College sweethearts are ready to find a vacation home for their family on Alabama's Smith Lake; they're shown several properties but each will require some work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Ala.; the property needs major renovations, but he's a contractor and is ready to get to work to help the family realize their lakeside living dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Md.; their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people but finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Minnesota is known as the Land of 10,000 Lakes and there's no better place to find the perfect house on the perfect lake; with lakefront prices at an all-time high, this couple will need to create their dream retreat with some hands-on renovations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather find a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas, and they plan to open up the kitchen, remodel the bathrooms, build a multi-level deck and fix up the boat dock.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: An early 1900s cabin that's intimately tied to Maine's history and legacy puts the team to the test as they try to re-create its original look and feel.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the Call of the Loon has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter; Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A man who recently inherited his dad's winter retreat wants to honor his father's memory while making the camp comfortable for year-round living for his family with a bigger bathroom, more inside light, a four-season porch, and space for their dogs.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: I Get by With the Help of Froggy Friends
programme.desc: A woman's husband suddenly passed away before finishing their family cabin; Chase and the Cabin Masters team up with some green friends to make this family's perfect summer cabin dreams come true.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Kristin's family has owned this cabin for five generations, but now would like to add on to the kitchen and raise the roof to comfortably fit her husband and son, and add more space for their daughter to enjoy the space with ease.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family finds their camp flooded when they return after winter; as the team pull back what remains of the floor, problems compound as they find powder post beetles, dry rot and more.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: I Get by With the Help of Froggy Friends
programme.desc: A woman's husband suddenly passed away before finishing their family cabin; Chase and the Cabin Masters team up with some green friends to make this family's perfect summer cabin dreams come true.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Kristin's family has owned this cabin for five generations, but now would like to add on to the kitchen and raise the roof to comfortably fit her husband and son, and add more space for their daughter to enjoy the space with ease.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family finds their camp flooded when they return after winter; as the team pull back what remains of the floor, problems compound as they find powder post beetles, dry rot and more.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A man who recently inherited his dad's winter retreat wants to honor his father's memory while making the camp comfortable for year-round living for his family with a bigger bathroom, more inside light, a four-season porch, and space for their dogs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The crew travels to Wise, Virginia, to save a stunning log home dating back to the 1860s; the Appalachian icon has been in one family for four generations, so Mark and the guys must salvage everything they can.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The builders battle extreme weather in Sacramento, Ky. to save a cabin built in 1853.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters offer a tour of their home turf and highlight some of their favorite areas, activities and cabins across the Pine Tree State.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Adaptive Outdoor Education Center (AOEC) is looking to use their pond by creating a trail and elevated clubhouse overlooking the water, so the team must apply ADA compliant techniques to ensure that the path and structure are accessible for all.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: At the Russell Woods project, Tommy uses a clever fix for some damaged oak flooring in the living room; Frank and Tamiko meet with Jerusha Kaffine, a local kitchen designer, to see her plan; repairing the front steps before new gutters go up.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New cabinets and kitchen tiles at the Grandmont Rosedale project; reinstall leaded glass bay windows at Russell Woods; wood grain tile; a decoupling membrane underlayment that supports electric wire heating; urban farming in Detroit; a drywell.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.sub-title: Detroit: Going Old School for Tile and Molding
programme.desc: Frank and Tamiko prep the guest room for painting; Tommy repairs crown molding in the living room; installing plumbing fixtures; Tommy and Frank fit an interior door into an old opening; a fireplace facelift using 100-year-old pottery.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Tommy pull up to the completed Russell Woods project to reflect on their time in the city and restoration efforts; an overview of the furnace, water heater and water filtration system; selling the property; feedback from homebuyers.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Building Back America's Trades
programme.desc: Deadlines loom as students and mentors race to build homes, secure jobs, and chart their futures. Doubt, discrimination, and hard choices lie around every corner as the realities of the present interrupt dreams of skilled trades futures.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Matt and Samantha Hardy look to move from Austin to Waco, Texas, and purchase their first house together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.sub-title: Big Budget for a Big House
programme.desc: A couple narrow down their search to three homes that would work for their family of five, and task Chip and Jo with determining which house has the most renovation potential for their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: Within the worn halls of an 1890s Victorian, a modernized Italian monastery, and an American Revolutionary era stone house, families around the world take the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to revive.

programme.title: Storied Spaces
programme.desc: From the shores of the Oregon Coast to the Washington wilderness and all the way to a Texas lake, visionary homeowners turn their home design dreams into reality with stunningly unique waterfront havens.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of four is building a luxury glamping escape overlooking the Texas Hill Country, but the build process is anything but glamorous; with the rain, challenging terrain and critters, they must work together to get to the finish line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
